title: Earnings Preview: Chewy (CHWY) Q4 2023 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Chewy was expected to deliver a year-over-year decline in earnings on higher revenues when it reported results for the quarter ended January 2023. The earnings report was expected to be released on March 22, 2023. The company was expected to post a quarterly loss of $0.12 per share, representing a year-over-year change of -9.1%. However, analysts had recently become bearish on the company's earnings prospects, with an Earnings ESP of -17.65%. This preview indicated initial pessimism about profitability in the quarter, though the company ultimately beat expectations with $0.16 EPS. The context suggested that post-pandemic normalization continued to pressure margins, though the company's scale and operational efficiency improvements were beginning to show.
